race.comment: FONDLED (5) boxed on to finish second last start over 1118m at this track, beaten 1.3 lengths when fresh from a spell as favourite. Will be better for that outing and the low draw presents a big chance to go one better in what shapes as a weaker race. DIVINE EMPRESS (8) last appeared 2.5 weeks ago over 1006m at Sale when she finished fifth. This is nowhere as strong as that race and new trainer Jason Warren will no doubt have her primed for the stable debut. IL PATRIGNO (2) will find this easier than most starts to date and has jumped out OK. TOY MAKER (12) needs to lift on the debut run but will be better for that and strikes a race lacking depth, so she can sneak into the top four.
